summary: Phase 3 Testing Complete: Activity Log + Undo Functionality. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: Quick Undo button, Activity Log modal with enhanced UI (colors, labels, filter dropdown, undo buttons per row, [DESHECHO] labels for undone actions).

issues: Minor React hydration warnings (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - reverts update_order (restores previous field values)
BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - reverts delete_order (restores from trash to original board)
BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - reverts move_order (moves back to original board)
BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - reverts create_order (moves to trash)
BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - reverts bulk_move_orders (restores each order to original board)
BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - returns 400 for non-undoable actions
BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - returns 400 for already-undone actions
BACKEND: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - requires admin (returns 401/403 for non-admin)
BACKEND: GET /api/activity - supports action_filter query param
BACKEND: GET /api/activity - without filter returns all action types
BACKEND: Activity logs include undoable=True and previous_data for undoable actions
BACKEND: update_order previous_data contains correct old field values
BACKEND: Non-undoable actions (login) have undoable=False
BACKEND: Performing undo creates new undo_action log entry
FRONTEND: Quick Undo button visible in header (data-testid='quick-undo-btn')
FRONTEND: Activity Log button visible (data-testid='activity-log-btn')
FRONTEND: Activity Log modal opens (data-testid='activity-log-modal')
FRONTEND: Activity filter dropdown visible (data-testid='activity-filter')
FRONTEND: Found 17 undo buttons in activity rows
FRONTEND: Found 11 [DESHECHO] labels for undone actions
FRONTEND: Action badges show correct colors (green=create, blue=edit, red=delete, purple=undo)
FRONTEND: Readable Spanish action labels displayed (Crear orden, Editar orden, Eliminar permanente, Deshacer)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py lines 207-222: log_activity function properly stores previous_data for undo
Backend server.py lines 1113-1181: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} correctly handles update_order, move_order, delete_order, create_order, bulk_move_orders
Backend server.py lines 1094-1111: GET /api/activity correctly supports action_filter query param
Frontend Dashboard.js lines 1251-1294: ACTION_LABELS and ACTION_COLORS constants properly defined
Frontend Dashboard.js lines 1296-1342: ActivityLogModal correctly shows filter dropdown, undo buttons, and [DESHECHO] labels
Frontend Dashboard.js lines 2240-2242: Quick Undo button correctly shown for admin only
seed_data_creation: Backend tests auto-create and cleanup test data (UNDO_TEST_*, PREV_DATA_TEST_*, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Undo features fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} works for all supported actions (update_order, move_order, delete_order, create_order, bulk_move_orders). Activity logs now have undoable, undone, previous_data fields. GET /api/activity supports action_filter param. Frontend: ActivityLogModal shows enhanced UI with colored badges (ACTION_COLORS), readable labels (ACTION_LABELS), filter dropdown, undo buttons per undoable row, [DESHECHO] label for undone actions. Quick Undo button in header (admin only) undoes the last undoable action.

endpoints: POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - Reverts update_order (restores previous field values)
POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - Reverts delete_order (restores from trash to original board)
POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - Reverts move_order (moves back to original board)
POST /api/undo/{activity_id} - Reverts bulk_move_orders (restores each order to original board)

features: Activity logs include undoable boolean field
Activity logs include undone boolean field
Activity logs include previous_data for undo

frontend_ui.quick_undo_btn: data-testid='quick-undo-btn' - Admin only, visible in header
frontend_ui.activity_log_modal: data-testid='activity-log-modal' - Enhanced UI with colors and labels
frontend_ui.activity_filter: data-testid='activity-filter' - Filter by action type dropdown
frontend_ui.deshecho_labels: [DESHECHO] labels shown for undone actions (11 found)
frontend_ui.action_labels: Spanish labels: Crear orden, Editar orden, Mover orden, Eliminar orden, Deshacer
